name: My Pressure Cooker Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in oil.
2. Add onion, tomato juice, salt, pepper, and garlic powder to the pot. Stir.
3. Pressure cook for 15 minutes per pound of meat.
4. Add salt, Worcestershire sauce, and water.
5. Pressure cook for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Thicken the sauce and serve.
